name: Black Walnut Oatmeal Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine eggs, sugar, corn syrup, evaporated milk, oats, nuts, butter, vanilla, and 1/8 teaspoon salt.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry crust and trim the edge.
4. Place the pie plate on the oven rack and pour in the filling.
5. Protect the edge of the pie with foil to prevent overbrowning.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
7. Remove the foil and bake for about 25 more minutes, or until the top is deep golden brown and slightly puffy.
8. The filling should be slightly soft but will firm up as it cools.
9. Cool completely before serving.
Makes 1 pie.
